name: vera-stat-continuous-testing
description: Runs distribution diagnostics and primary hypothesis tests for continuous outcome variables. Produces Shapiro-Wilk normality check, skewness, kurtosis, Q-Q plot, and one fully interpreted group comparison (Welch's t for 2 groups or ANOVA with Tukey HSD for 3+ groups) with effect sizes and nonparametric confirmation. Ends with a recommendation block listing Outputs .R and .py scripts with 2 publication-quality plots. Triggered when user has a continuous/numeric outcome and says "analyze continuous outcome," "my DV is numeric," "compare group means," or names a continuous variable like weight, score, income, time, cost, mpg, blood pressure. Does not handle binary, count, survival, ordinal, repeated measures, or SEM outcomes.
